plugins.name: evergreen
plugins.description: Keeps documentation honest with the code it describes. A skill, not a scanner: when code changes, the agent walks a freshness ladder (vanished paths → dead contracts → drifted snippets → semantic prose) and proves each finding against the code. Three axes — truth (flag / winnow), craft (flourish: rewrite ugly-but-true docs to a gold standard, then verify), hygiene (cultivate: clear slop and local-only leaks). The reflex rewrites nothing unasked. Language-agnostic.
